div.head: The Minister in Venezuela (Cook) to the Secretary of State
div.p: Sir: With reference to Department’s instructions of October 18th, 1923 and telegram No. 28 1/2 [28] of November 17, 5 p.m.,Not printed. concerning the Instrument of Ratification by the Venezuelan Government of the Extradition Treaty recently concluded between the United States and Venezuela, and additional Article thereto, I have the honor to enclose herewith Venezuela’s Instrument of RatificationNot printed. including the English text thereof appropriately certified as indicated in the memorandum enclosed with my dispatch No. 417 of July 19 [18], and approved by the Department in its instructions of October 18, 1923, and the signed English original of the Protocol of Exchange.Not printed.
